summary: Iteration 34: Live Tracking Logic Tests - All 20 Tests Passed (100%). Verified all live tracking fixes: 1) Soccer fixture fetching uses 3 parallel API queries (date=today, date=yesterday, last=3) with deduplication by fixture ID, 2) Soccer fixture matching returns ANY live game immediately without opponent name check (opponent_name='Unknown' or empty still matches), 3) Soccer finished games still require opponent name + time proximity matching, 4) Basketball fixture matching returns ANY live game immediately without opponent name check, 5) Basketball finished games still require opponent name + time proximity matching, 6) Both prediction routes force-set player and opponent from request data.

minor.issue: Duplicate 'return g' statement (dead code) - FIXED by testing agent

critical_code_review_comments: picks.py _match_soccer_fixture (line ~341-384): Correctly returns ANY live game immediately without opponent check. For finished games, opponent matching is used only if opponent_name is not 'unknown', 'tbd', or empty.
picks.py _match_basketball_game (line ~517-561): Same logic as soccer - live games match immediately, finished games use opponent matching.
picks.py _process_soccer_live (line ~270-338): Correctly fires 3 parallel API queries (date=today, date=yesterday, last=3) and deduplicates by fixture ID using seen_ids set.
FIXED: Removed duplicate 'return g' statement on line 559-560 (dead code)
seed_data_creation: None - unit tests with mock fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All live tracking fixes verified. Key changes: 1) Soccer fixture fetching now uses 3 parallel queries (date=today, date=yesterday, last=3) instead of just last=3 - this ensures live games are found since 'last' only returns finished games. 2) Both soccer and basketball fixture matching now return ANY live game immediately without opponent name check - a team can only play one game at a time. 3) For finished games, opponent matching is still used for accuracy but skipped if opponent is 'unknown', 'tbd', or empty.

soccer_live_tracking_stuck_on_scheduled.issue: Soccer picks stayed stuck on SCHEDULED while basketball worked fine
soccer_live_tracking_stuck_on_scheduled.root_cause_1: Soccer fixture lookup used 'last=3' which only returns finished games, missing live ones
soccer_live_tracking_stuck_on_scheduled.root_cause_2: Opponent name matching was too strict - if opponentName was 'Unknown' or empty, the live game was never matched
soccer_live_tracking_stuck_on_scheduled.fix_1: Added date-based queries (today + yesterday) in parallel with last=3
soccer_live_tracking_stuck_on_scheduled.fix_2: Removed opponent name requirement for live games (a team can only play one game at a time)
